summary: The preoperational stage as per Piaget lasts from around 2 to 6 years; this involves children being unable to perform logical operations and focusing more on concrete experiences rather than abstract thinking. \(\boxed{\text{The preoperational stage covers childhood from roughly 2 to 6 years where kids focus mainly on tangible objects instead of understanding complex logic}}\)
